Interface Variable

All Superinterfaces:
AccessFlags, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
EnumConstant, Field
All Known Implementing Classes:
EnumConstantSpecification, FieldInfo, FieldSpecification, VariableSpecification
public interface Variable extends ProgramModelElement
A program model element representing variables.
